val_period.note: Hyperparameters tuned via expanding-window CV on train only; no separate held-out val set exported.

methodology_config.entry_exit: event window aligned to target (t0-5 -> t0+60)

selection_reason: Selected M3_gbdt with selection_score=0.7318 (dir_acc=0.9, sharpe_clipped=0.5358927490161004, r2_clipped=0.7368028593925009, n_trades=24, cum_ret=0.1688248823385725, rmse=0.002671434635491488). Trade filter applied. Among models with n_trades >= 5: score = 0.40 * directional_accuracy + 0.35 * sharpe_like_clipped + 0.25 * r2_clipped; if none qualify, drop trade filter. Tie-break: higher cumulative_return, then lower RMSE. Thresholds from train-only predictions; walkforward_mode=expanding_refit_fixed_hparams.
